* Collaborate with business users and vendors to analyse requirements, prioritise change requests, and implement system improvements.
* Develop and maintain user guides, process documentation, and training materials to support knowledge sharing and user adoption.
* Identify opportunities to improve business processes and workflows, driving efficiency through system enhancements and process optimisation.
* Support user onboarding and offboarding by ensuring timely application provisioning, access management, and user enablement.
* Contribute to projects and improvement initiatives across the Process & IT function, balancing operational support with the delivery of new capabilities.


**Who You Are**
 We're looking for someone who enjoys solving problems, improving processes, and working closely with both business and IT stakeholders. You are curious, eager to learn, and comfortable taking ownership of tasks, whether it's resolving a support issue, coordinating testing, or driving a process improvement initiative.
   

  

 You are structured and organised in your approach, able to balance operational responsibilities with project work while managing competing priorities. As a strong communicator, you build positive relationships across teams and are confident working in a collaborative environment.
   

  

 Most importantly, you have a continuous improvement mindset, enjoy learning new systems and technologies, and are motivated by making a tangible impact on how the business operates.
   

  

 For this position, we imagine that you will have:
   

  

  

* A relevant university degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 3+ years of experience in application support, service management, process development, or a related IT/business systems role.
* Experience working with incident management, change management, service requests, and user support.
* Experience participating in system implementations, enhancements, testing (UAT), or continuous improvement initiatives.
* Experience with user access management, IT controls, compliance, or audit-related activities.
* Experience in financing, financial services, or a regulated business environment is highly preferred.
* Professional proficiency in English; Swedish is an advantage.
* Familiarity with View21 and/or Microsoft Dynamics 365 CRM is an advantage.
* Knowledge of Lean methodologies or the Scania Way is beneficial.
* Experience working in an international or cross-functional environment is an advantage.


**This Is Us**
 Our Process & IT team consists of six dedicated professionals with diverse backgrounds and expertise. We are responsible for the technology and processes that enable our business to operate efficiently - from application support and infrastructure to reporting, AI and analytics, business systems, and process optimisation. Working closely with business stakeholders, we deliver practical digital solutions that create value across the organisation and support our continued growth.
   

  

 At Scania Credit, we value teamwork, diversity, and respect. We believe everyone should feel empowered to be themselves at work. Our culture is built on respect for the individual, continuous improvement, and always putting the customer first.
   

  

 Are you passionate about improving business processes through technology? Do you enjoy solving problems, collaborating with stakeholders, and delivering solutions that make a real business impact? If so, we'd love to hear from you. Join Scania Credit as a Process Developer and help shape the future of our business systems and digital transformation!
   

  

**Scania Credit Offers**
 We offer a dynamic and engaging workplace where collaboration, innovation, and continuous improvement are part of everyday life. You will be part of a strong team environment that encourages knowledge sharing and close cooperation across functions.
   

  

 Benefits include access to our health center in Gröndal or a wellness allowance, bonus, flexible working hours, and company car leasing. We also arrange events for employees and their families, and for those living in Stockholm, convenient commuting is supported through direct Scania Job express buses to Södertälje.
   

  

**Application**
 We look forward to receiving your application, consisting of your CV and kindly ask you not to share a cover letter to ensure an efficient and unbiased recruitment process for all parties.
   

  

 Apply as soon as possible, no later than 2026-07-24. We review applications on an ongoing basis and encourage interested candidates to apply as soon as possible. The posting may close before the application deadline if a high volume of applications is received. Logical and personality tests may be used as part of the selection process, and a background check may be required for this role.
   

  

 If you have questions or would like more information, please contact: Michelle Dsouza, IT Manager, michelle.dsouza@scania.com
   

  

**We look forward to your application!**

title: Data Engineer
description:
**Description**
 Welcome to SSC Space (formerly Swedish Space Corporation), the perfect workplace for those passionate about technology in general and space in particular.
   

  

 With space organizations, research institutes, institutional and commercial actors as customers, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications, spacecraft consulting services, rocket and balloon systems, and much more.
   

  

 SSC Space also has one of the world’s largest global networks of ground stations for satellite communications. We own and operate the Esrange Space Center in Kiruna, northern Sweden, with the aim of launching satellites in the near future.
   

  

 Are you fueled by a passion for people and the ambition to create an awesome workplace?
   

  

 Are you ready to embark on an exciting journey with us to help Earth benefit from space?
   

  

 If you answer yes to these questions, we invite you to seize the opportunity to make a significant impact as Data Engineer in our team. We are looking for a dedicated person who shares our core values of Customer passion, Care, Collaboration, Curiosity, and Courage.
   

  

 The Software unit within SSC Space Connect is entrusted to develop and maintain critical systems required to connect our customers with their satellites. Our core business is to deliver satellite data to our customers, and the Data Engineering team owns critical components in this process. Their software ensures fast and reliable data delivery, as well as providing great observability for our customers and Network Management Center.
   

  

**Requirements**
 We think that you care – about your systems, your colleagues, and your users. That you have a creative and analytical mindset. You take responsibility, drive your own initiatives, and can learn and process technical details quickly. We also think that you appreciate both working autonomously and together with other people.
   

  

 You have a European citizenship and can travel within and outside Sweden if needed. As this position is critical to the operations of the SSC Space Services, it may include work outside of standard working hours, and/or being part of an on-call team with up to 1 week on-call per month.
   

  

 To succeed in this role, you should have:
   

  

* M.S. Computer Science or Computer/Software Engineering, or similar experience
* 3+ years of hands-on data engineering experience
* Proficiency in Python and SQL
* Hands-on experience with setting up and operating cloud services
* Excellent communication skills in English.


**We Also Value If You Have Experience With**
* Automation and/or workflow orchestration tools like Apache Airflow, Dagster and/or Prefect
* Data processing frameworks like Apache Spark/Flink/Beam or similar
* Dashboards and other data visualization technology, e.g. Grafana
* Data integration and ETL from/to interfaces like REST-APIs, databases and object storage/data lakes
* IoT systems integration and real-time data capture using protocols like MQTT, MODBUS etc.
* System administration in Linux
* Containerization, e.g. Docker.


**Responsibilities**
 We are looking for a senior data engineer to join us in the development of our new cloud-based data platform. Your key responsibilities will include designing, implementing, and maintaining:
   

  

* Data models
* Data integration & processing pipelines (ETL)
* Dashboards and reporting solutions
* Systems form an aged file transfer
* Our existing on-premises data platform.


**Benefits**
**We offer you** 

* A unique opportunity to contribute to a wide range of projects and play an active role in both the Swedish and international space industry.
* An excellent opportunity for personal and career development.
* An exciting, international workplace characterized by an open atmosphere and proud employees all over the world.


**Additional Benefits**
* In addition to vacation and traditional public holidays, we offer extra paid leave throughout the year, such as time off between Christmas and New Year, Ascension Day, amounting to 6-11 extra days depending on the calendar.
* Wellness allowance of SEK 5,000 per year.
* Health benefits such as voluntary health insurance and regular health checks for eligible employees.
* Access to a benefit bike through a tax-efficient leasing program.
* Support for employee-driven activities that promote connection, health, and culture across teams.
* Collective Agreement, including good pensions plans, parental pay and insurance.


**Location**
 This is a full-time, permanent position based at our office in either Solna or Kiruna.
   

  

**Further information**
 For questions regarding employment terms or union-related matters, you are welcome to contact our union representatives:
   

  

 Sveriges Ingenjörer: SverigesIngenjorer-AF@sscspace.com
   

  

 Unionen: unionen@sscspace.com
   

  

  

  

**Next Step**
 If this opportunity sparks your interest, we encourage you to apply as soon as possible! We review applications continuously and will conduct interviews throughout the process.
   

  

 You can submit your application up until 2026-08-23, which is the latest possible date for consideration.
   

  

 Please note, however, that the position may be filled before this date, and the advertisement may therefore close earlier. This allows us to manage the process efficiently and give each application the attention it deserves.
   

  

 When applying, please include your CV. While you are welcome to include a brief personal note or letter, our evaluation will primarily focus on your skills and qualifications as outlined in your CV, ensuring a fair and unbiased recruitment process.
   

  

 We would like to inform you that due to the summer holiday season, feedback in the recruitment process will take longer than usual.
   

  

 This position requires approved pre-employment screening. These controls are based on the role that you will fulfill within the company. Additional requirements regarding citizenship may apply.
   

  

**We help Earth benefit from space**
 SSC Space is a leading global provider of advanced space services, with more than 50 years of experience. We help space organizations, research institutes, commercial and institutional actors from all over the world to get access to space.
   

  

 With local presence on all continents and about 800 committed employees, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications and satellite control services, spacecraft operations, rocket and balloon systems, launch services and flight test services, as well as engineering, operations and consultancy services for space missions.
   

  

 We help Earth benefit from Space. Learn more at sscspace.com

title: AI Data engineer
description:
At Etteplan, we help our customers transform data into insights, innovation, and business value. As AI continues to reshape industries, the importance of high-quality data, scalable platforms, and reliable architectures has never been greater. To strengthen our Platform & Software Solutions teams, we are now looking for AI Data Engineers who want to play a key role in building the data foundations that power tomorrow's digital solutions.
   

  

 You'll work closely with customers across industries such as automotive, industrial technology, and advanced product development, helping them design and develop modern data platforms, integrations, and cloud-based solutions. Together with colleagues within software engineering, cloud, and AI, you'll contribute to projects where reliable data is essential for creating smarter products, better services, and informed business decisions.
   

  

 At Etteplan, you'll become part of a collaborative and knowledge-sharing culture where curiosity, technical excellence, and continuous learning are highly valued. We offer varied assignments, opportunities to develop your expertise, and the chance to work with technologies that are shaping the future.
   

  

**Your mission**
 As an AI Data Engineer, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and improving data foundations that support both business-critical systems and AI-driven solutions.
   

  

 Your responsibilities may include:
   

  

* Designing and maintaining scalable data models
* Building and maintaining ingestion pipelines, integrations, and data flows
* Establishing reliable data pipelines, data contracts, and quality controls
* Integrating external systems and data sources
* Improving data quality, traceability, and observability
* Contributing to backend and cloud infrastructure, including databases, monitoring, and scaling
* Collaborating with architects, developers, product teams, and customers
* Supporting engineering best practices, documentation, and CI/CD ways of working
* Supporting data governance and responsible AI initiatives where relevant


**Who are you?**
 Whether you are early in your career or an experienced specialist, you have a strong interest in data engineering and enjoy building reliable, scalable solutions that create value through data. You are curious about new technologies, keep up to date with developments within AI and data engineering, and enjoy collaborating with colleagues and customers to solve complex challenges.
   

  

 You are a person who enjoys taking initiative, sharing knowledge, and working collaboratively to create solutions that make a real difference for customers. Depending on your experience level, there will be opportunities to grow into technical leadership, architecture, and governance roles while continuing to develop your expertise within data and AI.
   

  

**To succeed in this role, we believe you have:**
* Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience
* Strong experience with SQL and relational data modelling
* Experience designing, building, and maintaining data pipelines
* Experience working with APIs and integrations
* Experience from at least one cloud environment, preferably AWS
* Working knowledge of agentic AI concepts and a genuine interest in following state-of-the-art developments in AI and data engineering
* Fluent communication skills in both Swedish and English, written and spoken


**It is considered a plus if you also have experience with:**
* PostgreSQL
* Python
* Node.js / TypeScript
* Snowflake and the modern data stack
* Data governance, AI governance, or AI solution architecture
* Architectural ownership within data, backend, or platform engineering
* Implementing or working with the EU Data Act and EU AI Act
* Marketplace, multi-stakeholder, startup, or other fast-moving product environments


**What We Offer**
 At Etteplan, you'll have the opportunity to work with a wide range of customers and projects – from established industrial leaders to innovative technology companies. Our assignments span multiple industries, giving you the chance to broaden your experience, build deep technical expertise, and continuously challenge yourself in new environments.
   

  

 You'll be part of a collaborative team that combines expertise in software development, cloud, AI, and data engineering. Knowledge sharing is a natural part of our culture, and you'll have colleagues who are eager to support, challenge, and learn from each other.
   

  

 We offer:
   

  

* Varied and technically challenging assignments across multiple industries
* The opportunity to work with modern data platforms, cloud technologies, and AI solutions
* A collaborative culture built on knowledge sharing and teamwork
* Continuous learning and professional development through projects, training, and experienced colleagues
* Opportunities to grow into architecture, technical leadership, or specialist roles
* Flexible ways of working that support a healthy work-life balance
* Competitive benefits, including wellness allowance, occupational pension, and other local employee benefits


 At Etteplan, you are never limited to a single project, technology, or industry. Whether you want to deepen your expertise within data engineering, explore new technologies, or take on greater technical responsibility, you'll find opportunities to grow and shape your career with us.
   

  

**Application and Next Steps**
 You apply by uploading your CV and answering a few short questions related to the position. Selection and interviews are conducted continuously, so don’t hesitate to submit your application. The recruitment process begins with a phone interview and is followed by meetings with the responsible consulting manager and, if needed, additional colleagues. Our goal is to keep the process smooth so that together we can take the next step forward.
   

  

**Let's build the data foundations behind the next generation of AI-powered solutions.**
*The summer period is here, and we have several open positions available during the holiday season. This typically means that we receive more applications than usual. As the selection process will take place during the first weeks of August, it may take a bit longer for us to get back to you regarding your status in the recruitment process.*

title: Verksamhetsutvecklare inom vapen, skydd och konflikthantering, Stockholm
description:
Kustbevakningen är en civil statlig myndighet som dygnet runt övervakar Sveriges kust och stora insjöar. Med vår maritima förmåga är vi en central operativ aktör i den maritima miljön. Vi har ett unikt uppdrag inom totalförsvaret där vi har uppdrag både inom det civila försvaret och under vissa förutsättningar även inom det militära försvaret. Vårt uppdrag omfattar sjöövervakning, ordningshållning, brottsbekämpning samt miljöberedskap till sjöss. Genom kontinuerlig insamling och delning av sjöinformation till andra myndigheter skapar vi en civil sjölägesbild som är avgörande för både krisberedskap och säkerhet i den maritima miljön.
   

  





 Våra fartyg och flygplan genomför ständigt sjöövervakning och vi kan agera snabbt vid hot om brottslighet, nödsituationer, olyckor eller hot mot sjösäkerheten. Kustbevakningen kombinerar denna övervakning med beredskap för räddnings- och miljöräddningstjänst till sjöss. Detta stärker samhällets förmåga att förebygga händelser och om något händer hantera och återställa ordning och säkerhet i den maritima miljön.
   

  





 Kustbevakningen är en arbetsplats som präglas av samarbete och engagemang över de organisatoriska gränserna.  Här finns engagerade medarbetare med varierande kompetenser vilket skapar en dynamisk arbetsplats med ständiga möjligheter att lära nytt. Kustbevakningen arbetar med och har stort fokus på medarbetarskap och ledarskap och det är därför viktigt att din värdegrund stämmer överens med Kustbevakningens – helhetssyn, välvilja och engagemang. Kustbevakningen erbjuder en attraktiv arbetsplats som utmärks av strävan att vara fri från diskriminering och ge lika möjligheter och rättigheter till alla.
   

  





**Beskrivning**




 Kustbevakningens enhet för metodutveckling sjöövervakning söker en verksamhetsutvecklare inom vapen, skydd och konflikthantering med placering i Karlskrona, Göteborg, Malmö eller Stockholm.
   

  





 Enheten för metodutveckling sjöövervakning tillhör myndighetens avdelning för Utveckling och Innovation (UI) och ansvarar för att utveckla, fastställa, följa upp och förvalta metoder för Kustbevakningens operativa verksamhet.
   

  





 Enheten ansvarar särskilt för utveckling av förmågor inom kontroll, tillsyn och brottsbekämpning. Inom dessa områden är konflikthantering, vapen och skydd centrala funktioner som ställer krav på operativ erfarenhet, taktisk förståelse och förmåga att omsätta erfarenhet till styrande metoder och arbetssätt.
   

  





 Arbetet omfattar utveckling av metoder, riskanalyser, rättstillämpning, styrning och verksamhetsstöd. Det bedrivs i nära samverkan med den operativa verksamheten och övriga delar av myndigheten, ofta i projektform och i tvärfunktionella processnätverk.
   

  





*Denna annons lyses på flera orter, för ansöka följ denna länk:*




 Verksamhetsutvecklare vapen, skydd och konflikthantering
   

  





**Arbetsuppgifter**




 Som verksamhetsutvecklare inom vapen, skydd och konflikthantering, blir du en av Kustbevakningens ledande sakkunniga inom området. Du ansvarar för myndighetens långsiktiga förmågeutveckling inom dina frågor och utgör ett kvalificerat expertstöd och rådgivare till hela myndigheten inom dessa sakområden.
   

  





 Du leder utvecklingen genom att ta fram systemmålsättningar, dimensionerande styrdokument och metodbeskrivningar som lägger grunden för hur Kustbevakningen ska utveckla, vidmakthålla och använda sina operativa förmågor. Du omsätter operativa behov, erfarenheter, hotbilder och rättsliga krav till metoder och arbetssätt som säkerställer en enhetlig, rättssäker och operativt relevant tillämpning i hela myndigheten. Du leder även utvecklingen av framtagning av skyddsutrustning och materiel inom området vapen, skydd och konflikthantering.
   

  





 Ditt arbete utgör grunden för tekniska kravspecifikationer, materielanskaffning, utbildning, implementering och operativ användning. Du bidrar med kvalificerat expertstöd inom frågor som rör vapenverkan, skydd, konflikthantering och taktiska överväganden samt medverkar i analyser och utvecklingsarbete för att stärka myndighetens operativa förmåga att möta förändrade hot och behov.
   

  





 Rollen innebär nära samverkan med den operativa verksamheten, övriga delar av myndigheten och externa samverkansparter. Du förväntas företräda Kustbevakningen inom dina sakområden och bidra till utvecklingen av myndighetens samlade operativa förmåga.
   

  





 Arbetet sker inom ramen för enhetens organisatoriska ansvar och uppdrag. Beroende på verksamhetens behov kan även andra sakområden och arbetsuppgifter bli aktuella.
   

  





**Kvalifikationer**




 Vi söker dig som har en gedigen operativ bakgrund och bred erfarenhet inom konflikthantering, vapen och skydd. Du är van att omsätta operativa erfarenheter till metoder, arbetssätt och utveckling av operativ förmåga.
   

  





 Som sökande har du relevant eftergymnasial utbildning i kombination med aktuell arbetslivserfarenhet inom aktuella sakområden eller motsvarande kompetens som Kustbevakningen bedömer som likvärdig.
   

  





 Du har:
 


* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av arbete med frågor som rör vapen, skydd och operativ taktik.
* Relevanta operativa och/eller stödfunktionsmässiga erfarenheter från exempelvis Kustbevakningen, Försvarsmakten, Polismyndigheten eller annan verksamhet med liknande uppdrag.



 Utöver ovan är det även meriterande om du har:
 


* Kunskap och erfarenhet inom det svenska rättssystemet.
* Kunskap och erfarenhet av att författa styrande dokument på olika nivåer och med varierande detaljeringsgrad.
* Kunskap och erfarenhet av förmågedimensionering och systemmålsättande arbete.
* Erfarenhet av projektledning och processuell ärendehantering.
* Kunskap och erfarenhet av arbete mot antagonistiska hot.
* Erfarenhet från maritim verksamhet.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av centralt utvecklingsarbete i större organisationer eller motsvarande.



 Du uttrycker dig mycket väl i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska. Du är analytisk, strukturerad och har förmåga att omsätta komplexa frågeställningar till tydliga och praktiskt användbara lösningar.
   

  





 Du arbetar självständigt och driver dina frågor framåt, samtidigt som du har lätt för att skapa förtroende och samverka med olika delar av verksamheten. Du är tydlig i din kommunikation, har ett gott omdöme och hög personlig integritet.
   

  





 Kustbevakningen är en rättsvårdande och brottsbekämpande myndighet med höga krav på rättssäkerhet och ansvar gentemot tredje man. Vi ser därför att du har ett starkt etiskt förhållningssätt och agerar med verksamhetens och rättssäkerhetens bästa i fokus.
   

  





 I urvalsarbetet kan tester komma att användas.
   

  





**Villkor**




 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning med inledande provanställning. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
   

  





 För anställning krävs svenskt medborgarskap, körkort för personbil, drogtest samt säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen.
   

  





 Kustbevakningen medverkar i utlandsuppdrag och internationella insatser. I anställningen ingår därför en skyldighet att tjänstgöra utomlands i de fall det krävs för verksamheten.
   

  





 Vid tillsvidareanställning medföljer även en skyldighet att krigsplaceras.
   

  





*Denna annons lyses på flera orter, för ansöka följ denna länk:*




*Verksamhetsutvecklare vapen, skydd och konflikthantering*




**Övrigt**




 För att kvalitetssäkra och effektivisera rekryteringsarbetet använder vi ett elektroniskt ansökningsformulär i samarbete med Varbi för samtliga lediga jobb. Fyll i din ansökan så omsorgsfullt som möjligt för att ge en rättvisande bild av dig själv.
   

  





 Kustbevakningen är en statlig myndighet och det innebär att uppgifterna som du lämnar till oss kan komma att lämnas ut enligt offentlighetsprincipen. Normalt gäller ingen sekretess för de uppgifter som behandlas i databasen. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ska du kontakta den kontaktperson som finns angiven i annonsen.
   

  





 Inför rekryteringsarbetet har Kustbevakningen tagit ställning till rekryteringskanaler och marknadsföring. Vi undanber oss därför bestämt kontakt med mediesäljare, rekryteringssajter och liknande.

title: Swedish Prompt Creation Expert
description:
**About the Project**

We’re searching for talented linguists to join Project Hamal and help us redefine how travelers engage with car rental and driving tips worldwide. This isn’t just a translation job — it’s an opportunity to craft AI-powered localization prompts that produce natural, culturally relevant, and engaging content for a major travel platform. You’ll play a key role in ensuring travelers get clear, concise, and actionable advice, all while amplifying the convenience of car hire services globally.


**What You’ll Be Doing**

* Engineer system and user prompts that guide LLMs (large language models) to create fluent, native-sounding content for Swedish (Sweden)
* Localize car hire tips across six key topics: driving style, parking, tolls and road charges, getting to rental counters, top sights by car, and insurance.
* Swedish (Sweden) -specific rules to ensure prompts account for grammar, formality, pronoun conventions, transport terminology, and cultural nuances.
* Produce two localized example outputs based on real source content.
* Identify and flag edge cases to help the team handle complexities like language expansion, cultural sensitivities, or technical constraints.

**Project Details:**

* **Start Date:** ASAP
* **Duration:** up to 5 hours with possible extension
* **Job Type:** Freelance
* **Location**: Remote (Sweden)
* **Language**: Swedish (Sweden)
* **Pay Rate:** $45.00/hour

**What We’re Looking For**

* Native or near native speaker of the Swedish (Sweden) language with strong English proficiency.
* Proven experience in localization or UX writing— you know how to work within tight character limits and craft user-friendly content.
* Confidence in AI content workflows— you can structure, refine, and evaluate LLM prompts to ensure high-quality outputs.
* Familiarity with travel and transport terminology in your market — you understand car hire, tolls, parking systems, and driving regulations.

**Nice to Have**

* Experience writing for travel platforms or mobile UX environments.
* Knowledge of local driving laws, emissions zones, or toll systems.
* A background in evaluating AI-generated text for fluency and tone.

  

Thank you for your interest in joining Welo Data’s community and contributing to this exciting project. We look forward to collaborating with you!
company_addresses: 15 W 37th St, 4th Floor New York, NY 10018
company_description: Welo Data supercharges top-tier AI models with diverse, ethical, and scalable datasets.

title: UX-designer
description:
Stockholm Kundcenter Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-08-02  



  

  

Vill du vara med och forma användarvänliga digitala upplevelser och stärka Löfs varumärke? Som senior UX-designer på Löf har du en nyckelroll i att utveckla kundcentrerad design, från insikt till färdig lösning, i våra digitala kanaler.


Löf är inte vilket försäkringsbolag som helst. Vi försäkrar och förebygger skador i sjukvården. Välkommen med din ansökan!


**Om tjänsten**
---------------


Som UX-designer är ditt ansvarsområde att utveckla och förvalta Löfs varumärkesprofil för att stärka Löf som bolag. Tjänsten är en nyckelfunktion i att vidareutveckla Löfs digitala kundrelationer, ett arbete som du bidrar till genom att på ett kundcentrerat sätt utveckla och förvalta UX-design för Löfs digitala kanaler och tjänster. Det gör du genom att arbeta brett med att utveckla ramverk för design och prototyparbete, skapande av såväl användarvänliga flöden som logiska strukturer för Löfs kunder. Uppdraget innebär även att ta fram skisser/prototyper i Figma och basera designbeslut på research, intervjuer och användartester. I din roll blir du användarens röst och du designar i linje med kundbehov och våra mål. Du kommer arbeta verksamhetsövergripande och i våra utvecklingsteam.


**Om dig som medarbetare**
--------------------------


För att passa in hos oss är du social, prestigelös och lyhörd. Du är en trygg person som kan förmedla kunskap och vägleda verksamheten. I din roll har du många kontaktytor och behöver därför ha en god samarbetsförmåga. För dig är det viktigt att leverera med kvalitet och du har ett professionellt förhållningssätt. Du är en person som är intresserad av ny teknik och delar gärna med dig av kunskap.


**Dina erfarenheter**
---------------------


Vi söker dig som har utbildning inom UX-design. Du har minst ett par års erfarenhet av UX-arbete. Vidare har du erfarenhet av förändringsarbete, tillgänglighetsanpassning av webbsidor enligt WCAG och utvecklingsverktyg inom UX samt förståelse för agila arbetssätt. Det är meriterande om du arbetat nära utvecklare, arbetat agilt samt om du har erfarenhet av bank- eller försäkringsbranschen. Vidare är det meriterande om du har kunskaper i frontend-utveckling.


**Inte vilket jobb som helst**
------------------------------


På Löf arbetar vi mål- och värderingsstyrt. Våra värdeord, drivna, respektfulla och ansvarstagande genomsyrar vårt sätt att arbeta.


Precis som vi bryr oss om våra kunder, bryr vi oss om våra medarbetare och vill ge dig förutsättningar för att utvecklas och göra ett så bra jobb som möjligt. Vi erbjuder en god företagskultur, ett omfattande kompetensutvecklingsprogram, breda hälso- och personalvårdsinsatser och nära samverkan med dina kollegor. Vi har också valt att ha ett flexibelt arbetsupplägg och vår arbetsplats finns i moderna lokaler centralt placerat i Stockholm.


**Om oss**
----------


Löf är det ledande försäkringsbolaget inom patientskador. Vårt uppdrag är att utreda och lämna ersättningen till patienter som skadas i vården, samt bidra till att antalet vårdrelaterade skador minskar. Vår arbetsplats ligger på Södermalm i Stockholm och tillsammans är vi cirka 240 medarbetare som jobbar med försäkring, skadereglering och patientsäkerhet.


Mer information om Löf hittar du på www.lof.se


**Kom och jobba med oss!**
--------------------------


Bifoga cv och personligt brev när du söker tjänsten. Eftersom urvalsprocessen sker löpande är det bra om du skickar in din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Sista ansökningsdagen är 2026-08-02.


Kontakt:
Bianca Billing, Facklig representant, SACO
08-551 011 38
bianca.billing@lof.se  

  

Malin Stjernlöf, Facklig representant Forena
08-551 010 92
malin.stjernlof@lof.se  

  

Josefine Wisenbeck, HR-specialist
072 092 04 37

title: Head of Digital Experience
description:
We’re looking for a **Head of Digital & Online Experience** to join us at Telia.


**I’m Anna von Gegerfelt, Head of Operational Excellence within Telia Sweden B2B,** and we are searching for someone ready to grow with us. We’re a supportive, forward-thinking organization focused on driving customer experience, self-service capabilities and simplicity to create sustainable growth.


**What you’ll do:**

You will be a key part of the B2B Operational Excellence leadership team, responsible for driving best-in-class customer experience and optimizing internal operations. Our north star is to make it easy to do business with us through simplification, digitalization, and transparency, utilizing customer insights and AI to guide us.


As Head of Digital & Online Experience you will lead a team of Product Managers and UX/UI designers, focused on our digital interfaces for our customers, including online tools as well as customer APIs. Our presence online covers open and logged-in, seamless customer journeys between attended and un-attended and ranges from SME all the way up to Public & Key, e-sales as well as e-support. In short, the full 360 online engagement of Telia B2B customer base.


* Develop our online presence, define and drive our digital channel strategy, harmonizing across e-sales, e-support and product specific portals to meet the needs of our wide customer base
* Create an “one Telia” experience that is intuitive to use, providing transparency and full visibility of engagement
* Consult with customers and stakeholders throughout the organization to ensure alignment and prioritization across customer expectations, business needs and operational efficiency
* Cooperate with other units within B2B as well as IT, Customer Operations, and external partners, in order to design, develop, maintain and grow our online e-sales and e-support volumes
* Balance strategic direction with tactical execution, ensuring ideas become valuable customer outcomes

**What will help you thrive in this role:**

To succeed in this role, you have the ability to set the direction for and execute on the agenda for our online channels. You understand the dynamics of SME as well as Major Accounts with regards to their need and use of digital channels and can translate that into tactical plans and roadmaps. You see the potential of AI and Analytics to enable insight driven decisions as well as to drive excellence in customer dialogue and internal efficiency. You are a strong communicator with the ability to create clarity and give direction, and you lead by example, cooperating with teams and individuals throughout B2B, Customer Operations, IT organizations and external partners.


* Proven experience in leadership, cross-functional change journeys, digital transformation and online channels for e-sales and e-support flows
* Strong knowledge of digital & online stores & self-service capabilities and the use of AI and customer insights within that space
* Experience from B2B telco or similar industries with both SME and Major / Public Account customers
* Ability to engage, envision and execute, create clarity and deliver measurable outcomes. Structured decision-maker with cross-functional cooperation skills with experience from complex organizations where collaboration and alignment are critical for success,
* Fluency in English & Swedish

**Join us to shape smarter living for people, businesses, and the planet**

At Telia, we’re a team of 15 000 colleagues across the Nordics and Baltics, passionate about technology and connectivity. As a Leading Telecommunications Operator & Climate Leader, we drive change with large-scale, impactful projects while building a sustainable, inclusive world.


Here, you can grow your skills, lead meaningful projects, and thrive in a supportive, diverse environment. Whether you’re taking your first step or your next, Telia is a place to grow, belong, and make a real impact.


**What we offer**

When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.


**Ready to make better happen?**

We look forward to receiving your application by **2026-08-10** . Please note that the application period is short, so please apply as soon as possible.


The next step in the recruitment process is to complete a personality test via Alva Labs. You will be contacted by our Talent Acquisition Team. We use tests to ensure an objective and fair selection that increases the accuracy of finding the right candidate for the role.


Background checks will be part of the process. Have any questions? Please reach out to recruiting manager Anna Von Gegerfelt at anna.von-gegerfelt@teliacompany.com . Since we are in the middle of the summer questions might not be answer straight away.


**Equal opportunities**

At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.


**Join us and let’s make better happen - together!**

title: UX/UI Designer
description:
**About Ubiquiti**
 At Ubiquiti Inc., we create technology platforms for Businesses, Smart Homes, and Internet Service Providers, driven by our goal to connect everyone, everywhere. To date, Ubiquiti has shipped over 100 million devices worldwide, from ISP networking products to next generation of IT solutions. Our growth is made possible by the dedicated team of hundreds behind the scenes. From software developers and product managers to designers and strategists, Team UI is driven to achieve our common goal: Rethinking IT. At Ubiquiti, you’ll heighten your potential and broaden your horizons - all while shaping the future of connectivity.
   

  

**We are currently looking for a highly skilled UX/UI Designer to our team in Stockholm, Sweden.**
***Please note that applicants must live in Sweden and hold a valid work permit at the time of application to be considered for this role.***
**Responsibilities**
* Design high-quality and user-friendly interfaces for web and mobile. Examples: UniFi Network app, UniFi Protect app, UniFi Design System, ui.com, store.ui.com, design.ui.com and more
* Embrace a design-first approach, pushing the boundaries of design by working on new and innovative ideas
* Co-work with key stakeholders including leadership, strategists, developers (FE/FS) and other designers
* Navigate an agile work environment, iterating quickly yet maintaining high quality
* Actively participate in mulitple projects across the company and voice your ideas on design improvements


**Requirements**
* Expert level UX and UI design skills
* Minimum five (5) years of experience designing interfaces for web and mobile
* Highly proficient in Figma
* Hands-on experience with prototyping using AI tools
* Strong interest in working hands-on with design, considering both user experience and UIs
* You take full ownership of your tasks and responsibilites
* Genuine passion for great UX
* Excellent communication skills and highly proficient in English (written and spoken)


**Nice To Have**
* Knowledge about networking, wireless technologies, camera surveillance or other relevant hardware products


**Benefits**
* International work environment
* Competitive compensation package including wellness allowance, occupational pension, medical insurance, private health insurance, life insurance and work-injury insurance
* Five weeks of holiday per year
* Flexible work hours and hybrid work model
* Modern office space located in Epicenter (Hötorget)
* Access to all the latest Ubiquiti products and prototypes for home use and tests


***Please note that a background check will be conducted in the final stage of the recruitment process***

title: Senior Product Designer
description:
Vill du bygga framtidens nyhetsupplevelse tillsammans med oss?
   

  

 Omni söker en Senior Product Designer som vill arbeta nära produkt, UX och utveckling för att skapa smartare, snabbare och bättre nyhetsupplevelser. Det här är en roll för dig som drivs av möjligheten att använda AI, stark produktdesign och ny teknik för att hjälpa människor att förstå vad som händer i världen – på ett sätt som är mer relevant, personligt och anpassat efter deras behov.
   

  

 Hos oss får du arbeta med en av Sveriges starkaste nyhetsprodukter, i ett team där idéer snabbt kan bli verklighet. Om du vill jobba med nyheter på en plats där produktutveckling, användarupplevelse och AI på riktigt kan förändra hur människor konsumerar och förstår nyheter, är Omni där du vill vara.
   

  

 Det här är en roll för dig som gillar att få saker att hända. Du är både strukturerad och hands-on, trivs i gränslandet mellan produkt, design och teknik och tycker om att lösa problem tillsammans med andra.
   

  

 Om rollen
   

  

 Du kommer att arbeta tätt tillsammans med Head of Product, Head of UX och utvecklingsteamet i det dagliga produktarbetet. Tjänsten är en projektanställning på 12 månader med god möjlighet till förlängning.
   

  

 Rollen är bred och operativ med stort fokus på genomförande, problemlösning och samarbete.
   

  

**Exempel På Arbetsuppgifter**
* Driva och projektleda mindre produktinitiativ tillsammans med andra teammedlemmar
* Ta fram skisser och wireframes i Figma utifrån användarbehov, affärsbehov och tekniska möjligheter
* Arbeta nära utvecklare för att förtydliga lösningar och säkerställa bra leverans
* Vara med och definiera produktkrav, flöden och affärsregler
* Översätta användarbehov och organisatoriska behov till konkreta produktlösningar
* Hjälpa till att strukturera och driva arbete framåt
* Bidra till utvecklingen av våra produkter, processer och arbetssätt
* Utforska hur AI och ny teknik kan förbättra våra produkter och användarupplevelser


 Vi tror att du
   

  

* Är en stark problemlösare som gillar att ta ansvar och driva arbete framåt
* Är operativ och trivs med att vara hands-on
* Har erfarenhet av produktutveckling i digitala produkter och appar
* Har gedigen erfarenhet av UX- och UI-arbete och är bekant med relevanta verktyg såsom Figma
* Är van att arbeta nära utvecklare
* Tänker ur ett helhetsperspektiv utifrån användarbehov, affärsmål och tekniska förutsättningar
* Är nyfiken på AI, nya verktyg och modern produktutveckling
* Kommunicerar tydligt och samarbetar bra med olika typer av kompetenser på svenska såväl engelska


 Det är ett extra plus om du är intresserad av media, nyheter eller innehållsdrivna produkter.
   

  

 Hos Omni
   

  

 På Omni arbetar vi med produkter som används av flera hundratusentals människor varje vecka. Vi är ett litet och snabbfotat team där idéer snabbt kan bli verklighet och där produkt, UX och teknik arbetar nära varandra.
   

  

 Hos Omni är alla medarbetares insatser, kunskap och idéer lika mycket värda. Det har skapat en stark, prestigelös och samarbetsdriven kultur där människor hjälper varandra och där bra idéer kan komma från vem som helst.
   

  

 Entreprenörsandan är viktig för oss och bidrar till en utvecklande och stimulerande arbetsmiljö där det finns stort utrymme att testa nytt, ta initiativ och påverka både produkterna och hur vi arbetar framåt.

title: Design Engineer
description:
**TL;DR** 
 - We're seeking exceptional experienced Design Engineers who combine strong frontend engineering fundamentals with a sharp eye for craft and interaction design. You’ll work closely with both design and engineering to build world-class interfaces that empower the next generation of creators and builders.
   

  

 Why Lovable?
   

  

 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Lovable-built applications and websites are visited hundreds of millions of times a month, and our enterprise footprint is compounding fast. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

 What we’re looking for
   

  

* 5+ years of years experience, shipping products users genuinely love
* Portfolio demonstrating sophisticated interactions and thoughtful user affordances required (if you don’t have a portfolio - please check out our other roles!)
* Ability to make smart trade-offs between speed and polish, knowing when to ship and when to refine
* Strong fundamental understanding of modern frontend systems - React architecture, state management, performance, accessibility, and scalable UI patterns. If your strengths lean more visual than technical, check out our Product Designer roles instead.
* Experience translating scrappy explorations into production-ready experiences
* Strong product sense with an eye for detail, accessibility, and usability


 What you’ll do
   

  

 In one sentence: Own and scale the user-facing experience of Lovable products, turning powerful capabilities into intuitive, magical interfaces.
   

  

* Design and build world class product experiences
* Drive front-end execution - pioneering new interaction patterns, micro-animations, and delightful details that elevate the entire experience
* Implement features in React/TypeScript with obsessive attention to detail
* Collaborate with backend, ML, design, and product teams to bring complex features to life in a seamless way
* Explore and iterate on visual designs with designers, translating explorations into scalable, web-native implementations
* Build and maintain reusable components that enhance consistency while enabling creativity across the product


 Our tech stack
   

  

 We're building with tools that both humans and AI love:
   

  

* Frontend: React, Tailwind
* Backend: Golang and Rust
* Cloud: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Many LLM providers
* DevOps & Tooling: Github Actions, Grafana, OTEL, , infra-as-code (Terraform)


 And always on the lookout for what's next!
   

  

 How we hire
   

  

* Fill in a short form then jump on an intro call with our recruiting team.
* Connect with the team and learn more about how we work.
* Show us some of your work you’re really proud of.
* Show us how you approach problems during several technical interviews, including a technical screening where we evaluate frontend engineering fundamentals at the same level we expect from Product Engineers.
* In some cases, we may opt to do paid, trial work.


**About Your Application**
* Please submit your application in English - it’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal

title: Game Designer | Candy Crush Soda Saga
description:
**Craft:**
 Games Design & Production
   

  

**Job Description:**
 Candy Crush Soda Saga is one of King’s biggest mobile games, enjoyed by millions of players around the world. We’re looking for a
 **Game Designer** 
 to help shape engaging player experiences within Soda’s Team Infinity, helping create engaging features and LiveOps experiences that deliver the right content to the right players at the right time , working closely with your Creative Lead. This is a great opportunity for a designer who cares deeply about game design, enjoys hands-on creation and iteration, and wants to make a meaningful impact on a live game played at global scale.
   

  

 Candy Crush Soda Saga is King’s second largest game, enjoyed by millions of players around the globe. Since 2014, players have crushed delicious candies, befriended Swedish fish, rescued gummy bears and collected soda bottles to flood the board with fizzy soda across more than 19,000 levels. Candy Crush Soda Saga is available to download for free on major platforms including the Apple App Store, Google Play, Amazon App Store, Windows App Store and Facebook.
   

  

 Your Role Within the Kingdom
   

  

 As a Game Designer on Soda, you'll take ownership of game design challenges from concept to implementation, working with a high degree of autonomy as part of a cross-functional team.
   

  

 You'll partner closely with product, engineering, UX, art, and other design crafts to create high-quality features that are intuitive, engaging and rewarding for players. You'll explore ideas hands-on, prototype and iterate on different solutions, creating clear design documentation that communicates the intended player experience, design rationale and implementation requirements.
   

  

**You will:**
* Design and own features from concept through implementation, balancing player needs, product goals and development constraints.
* Create engaging gameplay systems and mechanics that strengthen the overall player experience.
* Prototype, test, iterate, and refine design solutions until they are intuitive, engaging, and most importantly… fun!
* Use player insight, research, product understanding and data to inform design decisions and improve outcomes.
* Own moderately complex design problems, making informed decisions while proactively seeking feedback and leveraging the expertise of the wider design team.
* Communicate design rationale clearly, share regular progress updates, and contribute constructively to design discussions.
* Collaborate across disciplines and contribute to a collaborative design culture by sharing ideas, giving thoughtful feedback, and learning from others.
* Support implementation by producing clear specs, flows, tuning direction and other practical design artifacts.
* Contribute across adjacent areas when helpful, with curiosity for disciplines such as UX, systems, economy, narrative or level design.


 Skills to Create Thrills
   

  

**Experience**
* Experience designing gameplay features, systems, or mechanics for games. We welcome designers from a range of backgrounds; experience in mobile, casual, or free-to-play is an advantage.
* Proven ability to take ownership of design work, solve a wide range of design problems creatively, and deliver high-quality, implementation-ready outcomes.
* Experience working in cross-functional teams and contributing through iteration, feedback and live product development.


**Knowledge & Skills**
* Strong grounding in game design fundamentals, including mechanics, systems, player behavior, balancing and pacing.
* Ability to use player insight, testing and data to evaluate designs, improve quality and respond to changing product needs.
* Clear communication skills, with the ability to document designs, explain decisions and collaborate effectively with designers, developers, artists, UX and product partners.


**Key Attributes**
* Passion for game design, with curiosity, learning agility and strong motivation to create great games.
* Focus on player needs, designing with empathy and advocating for clear, meaningful and enjoyable experiences.
* Collaborative approach, openness to feedback and willingness to take initiative as priorities or insights evolve.


**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company for the mobile world with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile titles such as
 *Farm Heroes Saga* 
 . King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn and @lifeatking on Instagram.

title: Head of Digital Experience
