title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
Flightradar24 is one of the most successful growth-stage tech companies in Stockholm. Each month more than 50 million aviation enthusiasts visit Flightradar24 (app/website) and our Commercial services team has many of the biggest names in aviation on its customer list.
   

  

 We are looking for a Senior Platform Engineer with Data Engineering skills, who can quickly understand existing systems, work independently, and deliver value from day one. You will play a key role in evolving and improving our data platform, working closely with other engineers and stakeholders. You will be part of a data engineering team responsible for designing, building, and operating scalable data solutions in AWS. The work includes both hands-on development and architectural decision-making.
   

  

 The position requires that you are able to work from our office in Stockholm, Sweden. Relocation is not offered for this role.
   

  

 What you’ll do
   

  

 Your responsibilities include:
   

  

* Building and maintaining backend services for high-volume data processing and APIs
* Designing and improving data ingestion, streaming, and event processing (batch and real-time)
* Refactoring and enhancing existing services, pipelines, and infrastructure
* Implementing robust data collection, transformation, and storage solutions
* Operating and improving cloud-based platforms (primarily AWS)
* Improving observability, reliability, and operational tooling for production systems
* Contributing to best practices around CI/CD, testing, code quality, and documentation
* Collaborating with software engineers, data engineers, and analysts to deliver reliable data products


 Current tech stack
   

  

* Backend services: C++ and Python
* Cloud & Data Platform: AWS (S3, Glue/Spark, Airflow/MWAA, Athena, MSK/Kafka, Lambda)
* Streaming & Messaging: Kafka (or similar), RabbitMQ
* Databases & Storage: SQL/NoSQL systems (e.g., MySQL/MariaDB/Postgres, Redis, DynamoDB, data lake/warehouse patterns)
* DevOps & Platform: Docker, Kubernetes/EKS, Terraform
* Engineering practices: Infrastructure as Code, CI/CD, linting, unit tests, integration tests


**About You**
* Has several years of hands-on experience building and operating production systems
* Strong experience with software development in C++, Python, Go, Rust, (or similar)
* Strong experience designing and operating production backend systems
* Experience with data engineering architectures for ingestion and transformation
* Experience working with cloud-based platforms, preferably AWS
* Solid understanding of databases (warehouses, OLTP/OLAP concepts, query performance)
* Experience with event-driven or streaming architectures (Kafka or similar)
* Strong understanding of reliability, observability, and production operations


 We also see that you…
   

  

* Are self-driven and comfortable making technical decisions independently
* Can quickly understand and work within an existing codebase and architecture
* Value clean code, testing, automation, and pragmatic engineering practices
* Communicate clearly and professionally in English


 Bonus points
   

  

* Experience with Machine Learning concepts and data platforms supporting ML workloads
* Experience working with high-volume real-time telemetry or tracking data
* Domain knowledge in aviation data standards (e.g., ADS-B) or similar


**About Flightradar24**
 With over 6 million daily users, Flightradar24 is the world’s most popular flight tracking service. Our app regularly tops the App Store and Google Play Travel charts. We also offer a wide range of commercial services and our customers include many of the biggest names in aviation.
   

  

 We're constantly adding new services and improving existing products. To help us meet those challenges, we're looking for creative, collaborative and tech-savvy applicants to join us.
   

  

 Benefits of working at Flightradar24 include:
   

  

* Opportunity to impact a service with millions of end users from all around the world
* Flexible and social work environment with free beverages, fruit, and snacks
* Modern office in the heart of beautiful downtown Stockholm, Sweden
* Being part of a diverse team with +30 nationalities and 6 continents represented with English being our main language


 Flightradar24 started as a hobby project in 2006 when two Swedish aviation geeks decided to build a network of ADS-B receivers in Northern and Central Europe. In 2009 we opened up the network, and made it possible for anyone with an ADS-B receiver to upload data to the network. Many parts of the world were quickly covered, but the quest to provide global ADS-B coverage is still ongoing.
   

  

**Flightradar24 at a glance**
* Largest ADS-B network in the world with over 55,000 connected receivers
* 5+ million users per day
* 100+ million app downloads

title: Operations Specialist Infrastructure to Nordic Guarantee
description:
Vill du arbeta nära tekniken och ha en central roll i den dagliga IT‑driften i en modern och verksamhetskritisk miljö? Nordic Guarantee söker nu en
 **Operations Specialist Infrastructure** 
 med stark operativ förmåga, teknisk bredd och ansvar för både IT‑drift och samarbete med externa leverantörer.
   

  

**Din vardag**
 I rollen som Operations Specialist ansvarar du för att vår IT‑infrastruktur fungerar stabilt och effektivt i det dagliga arbetet. Rollen har ett tydligt operativt fokus där du arbetar hands‑on med drift, felsökning och teknisk support till verksamheten.
   

  

 I tjänsten har du även en viktig roll i att vidareutveckla våra infrastrukturtjänster. Du arbetar löpande med förbättringar, standardisering och kvalitetssäkring av IT‑miljön, i nära samarbete med både verksamheten och våra externa leverantörer. Rollen innebär även ett tydligt ansvar för leverantörsstyrning, där du följer upp leveranser, säkerställer efterlevnad av avtal och bidrar till att utveckla samarbeten över tid.
   

  

 Du fungerar som en viktig länk mellan verksamhet, teknik och leverantörer, och säkerställer att tjänster levereras enligt överenskommelse och med rätt kvalitet.
   

  

**Du Kommer Bland Annat Att**
* Arbeta operativt med daglig IT‑drift inom infrastruktur (servrar, nätverk, klienter och tjänster)
* Felsöka och hantera incidenter samt säkerställa att åtgärder följs upp
* Installera, konfigurera och underhålla system, klienter och konton
* Leda och följa upp externa IT‑leverantörer i den dagliga driften
* Delta i och driva förbättrings- och utvecklingsinitiativ inom IT‑infrastruktur
* Säkerställa stabilitet, säkerhet och tillgänglighet i IT‑miljön


**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som trivs med att arbeta självständigt, men som också är en naturlig samarbetspartner till andra team. Du är van att navigera i en global och ibland komplex företagsmiljö och är bekväm med att arbeta i strukturer där det kan förekomma flera rapporteringslinjer. Du har en god förmåga att prioritera, kommunicera och skapa struktur även när många intressenter är involverade. Du förstår hur olika delar av infrastrukturen hänger ihop och är trygg i att själv arbeta hands-on i tekniken för att förbättra och lösa uppgifter.
   

  

**Vi Ser Att Du Har**
* Flera års erfarenhet av operativt arbete inom IT‑drift och incidenthantering
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med och samordna externa IT‑leverantörer
* God teknisk förståelse för IT‑infrastruktur såsom servrar, nätverk, klientmiljöer och molntjänster
* Vana att arbeta med Microsofts produkter och tjänster
* Obehindrade kunskaper i svenska och engelska, i både tal och skrift
* Vi ser det som meriterande om du har erfarenhet och kunskap inom SQL databaser.


*Skulle du ha frågor eller funderingar om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta rekryteringskonsult Jacob Elmeljung på* 
*jacob.elmeljung@wiseit.se* 
*.*
**Om Nordic Guarantee**
 Nordic Guarantee är ett expansivt bolag som erbjuder försäkringar och finansiella lösningar i Norden och på flera internationella marknader. Vi är en del av en växande och global verksamhet, med ett starkt lokalt team. Hos oss får du arbeta i en internationell kontext – men med den nära och familjära känslan av ett mindre företag.
   

  

 Vårt huvudkontor ligger i ljusa och moderna lokaler i Kista Science Tower, och vi arbetar gränsöverskridande med kollegor i Sverige, Danmark, Finland, Norge och Spanien. IT är en central funktion i vårt arbete, och vi strävar efter en stabil, skalbar och modern infrastruktur som stödjer hela vår verksamhet.
   

  

 Här får du möjlighet att påverka, utvecklas och vara en del av ett team där vi hjälper varandra och löser utmaningar tillsammans. Vi erbjuder en flexibel arbetsmiljö med balans, frihet under ansvar och stort fokus på kvalitet i allt vi gör.

title: Senior AI Enablement Engineer
description:
**Description**
*Position at LeoVegas Group*
**About The Role**
 We are seeking a hands-on, technically fluent engineer to drive the adoption of AI across our entire development organization - someone who finds the friction in how teams work and turns it into automated, AI-powered solutions.
   

  

 As our
 **AI Enablement Engineer** 
 , you will embed with engineering and product teams to identify where AI can remove repetitive, manual work, then build and ship the solutions that make it happen. You will work closely with our AI Efficiency Architects and AI Evangelist to turn high-level AI strategy into concrete, measurable wins on the ground.
   

  

 This role is ideal for someone who enjoys variety, moves fast, and gets real satisfaction from seeing their work adopted and relied upon by teams across the company.
   

  

**Your Mission**
 Accelerate how the entire development organization works by finding high-impact use cases for AI, building the solutions that automate them, and spreading those wins so they scale across teams.
   

  

**YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:**
* Use Case Discovery: work directly with engineering and product teams to map their workflows, spot repetitive or slow processes, and identify the highest-impact opportunities for AI-driven automation across the development organization.
* Rapid Prototyping & Delivery: act as a builder - lead the technical design and implementation of working solutions such as prompt workflows, lightweight agents, scripts, and integrations that prove value fast, then partnering with the AI Efficiency Architects to harden anything that needs to run in production.
* Reusable Enablement Assets: create templates, playbooks, and repeatable patterns so a proven AI win can spread from one team to many without bespoke work each time.
* Adoption & Measurement: drive genuine adoption of AI tooling across teams and tie every solution back to concrete outcomes - time saved, throughput, and delivery speed - so impact is visible and quantifiable to leadership.
* Feedback to the Platform: surface recurring needs and friction back to the AI Efficiency Architects, so the internal AI gateway and tooling evolve toward what teams actually need.
* Technical Mentorship & Influence: mentor senior engineers on AI best practices and influence engineering roadmaps.


**OUR SUCCESSFUL CANDIDATE WILL HAVE THE FOLLOWING:**
**Essential Skills**
* Staff-Level Engineering Foundations: 8+ years of professional software engineering experience (Java, Python, Go, or TypeScript) with a proven track record of delivering complex, distributed systems in a production environment.
* Production-Ready AI Expertise: Deep, hands-on experience moving AI from a cool prototype to a real-world tool. You don’t just write basic prompts - you know how to build reliable agents and RAG workflows, and you understand the practical side of LLMs, like managing costs, speed, and context limits to make tools actually work for production.
* Strategic Problem-Solving: You have a strong bias for action and can take a vague problem and turn it into a working solution fast. While you focus on delivering value quickly rather than chasing perfection, you always think big - building smart, reusable tools that fix root problems for hundreds of developers, not just one team.
* Collaboration & Communication: excellent interpersonal skills and the ability to work alongside many different teams, understand their needs, and bring them along on the adoption journey.
* SDLC/DevOps Familiarity: working knowledge of the tools that underpin the software delivery lifecycle (e.g., GitLab/GitHub, CI/CD pipelines, source control) so that solutions fit naturally into how teams already work.
* Self-Direction: capacity to manage a varied portfolio of work across multiple teams, prioritize for impact, and deliver with minimal supervision.


**NICE TO HAVES**
* Excellent presentation and training skills
* Previous experience running enablement, developer experience, or internal tooling initiatives


**Who We Are**
 At the core of LeoVegas Group is Team Leo. Our culture is our foundation and is what enables us to innovate, build, and lead as we trailblaze our way through the igaming industry. We’re a team of over 2000 innovators, initiators, and groundbreakers working in a fast-paced and agile environment across 19 offices worldwide.
   

  

**Benefits**
* Hybrid work policy
* 4 weeks of Workation (T&C apply)
* 30 annual vacation days
* Occupational Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness contribution annually
* Parental Leave Top-Up
* Possibility to enrol in a private health care insurance for both you and your partner
* 1,500 SEK equipment allowance
* Benify - benefits portal with many offers and discounts


 In our pride, we empower our teammates to find their roar and run with their wildest ideas. We don’t wait for things to happen; we pounce and make it happen!
   

  

 Would you be a good fit for the Leo Pride - give us a roar!
   

  

 \*\*As our company working language is English, we’d like to see your CV in English, please\*\*

title: Databricks Champion
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Your role**
 We are now seeking a passionate Databricks Expert/Champion or someone to growing into that space to join us. In this role, you will play an important role in shaping and contributing to Capgemini’s data, analytics & AI strategy forward using the Databricks platform. You will work hands-on with the latest tools in data ingestion, ETL, orchestration, and machine learning, while also contributing to solution design, architecture, and customer engagement. This is a role for someone who thrives at the intersection of technology, strategy, and communication.
   

  

 Capgemini has a strong and close collaboration with Databricks and was named EMEA Partner of the Year 2024, 2025 and 2026 – a recognition of our customer growth, joint engagements, and technical excellence. As part of our team, you’ll help strengthen this partnership and guide organizations in unlocking the full potential of the Databricks platform.
   

  

 We know that great candidates don’t always meet every requirement. If you’re interested in the role, we encourage you to apply even if your experience doesn’t match every point listed.
   

  

*In this role you will play a key part in:*
* Design and implement high-performance data pipelines using Databricks and Apache Spark
* Build and maintain secure data lakehouses and data warehouses in Azure
* Integrate AI/ML models into data pipelines using Databricks ML and Azure ML
* Lead or contributing to solutioning and architecture efforts – from whiteboard to production
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams including data scientists, analysts, and DevOps engineers
* Participate in presales, technical workshops, and customer presentations


**Your profile**
 We see this role being a great fit for someone with experience as a data engineer or architect with a passion for building scalable, high-impact data solutions. You combine deep technical skills with strong communication and solutioning capabilities.
   

  

 You have:
   

  

* Proven experience designing and implementing data platforms using Databricks, Apache Spark, SQL and Python
* Several years of hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure, including services like Azure Data Lake Storage, Azure Data Factory, and Azure ML
* A solid understanding of data architecture, including lakehouse design, data modeling and governance
* Experience working in presales, technical workshops and customer-facing presentations
* A collaborative mindset and the ability to translate business needs into technical solutions


**Databricks Champion – or on your way there**
*We are looking for someone who is either:*
* An official Databricks Champion, recognized for their technical excellence and community contributions, or
* A high-level Databricks expert with the ambition and potential to become a Champion. With Capgemini’s support, network, and close partnership with Databricks, we’ll help you take that next step.


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
 We recognize the significance of flexible work arrangements to provide support. Be it remote work, or flexible work hours, you will get an environment to maintain healthy work life balance.
   

  

 At the heart of our mission is your career growth. Our array of career growth programs and diverse professions are crafted to support you in exploring a world of opportunities.
   

  

 We partner with names such as Google, Microsoft, Amazon and Databricks, which can equip you with valuable certifications in the latest technologies in line with your ambitions.
   

  

**Application**
*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required. We are committed to building a diverse and inclusive workplace and welcome applications from people of all backgrounds, experiences and perspectives. We particularly encourage women and underrepresented groups in tech to apply.
   

  

 Please note that, due to the
 **summer holiday period** 
 , there may be a slightly longer response time in our recruitment process. We appreciate your patience and look forward to reviewing your application.*
**About Capgemini**
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
   

  

**Make it real** 
 | www.capgemini.com

title: Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer
description:
**Do you want to be at the forefront of protecting our society against cyber threats? We are looking for a Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer to team up with the most dedicated team of cyber specialists in our Secure Infrastructure domain.**
**About Truesec – A Leading Cybersecurity Company**
 Since 2005, Truesec has been a native cybersecurity company, driven by one single purpose: Creating safety and sustainability in a digital world by preventing cyber breach and minimizing impact.
   

  

 Over the years, we’ve earned the trust of organizations worldwide and gained a strong reputation internationally. Our team consists of dedicated specialists covering the entire spectrum of cybersecurity – with capabilities in Predict, Prevent, Protect, Respond, and Recover.
   

  

 Today, we employ around 400 employees – and as cybercrime grows, we need to grow. To support that goal, we are now looking for a Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer who wants to create advanced security solutions in our Secure Infrastructure Domain.
   

  

**Secure Infrastructure**
 Looking at the actual threat landscape today, it’s more important than ever to design and build infrastructure solutions that incorporate correct and relevant security features. The team works closely together using their combined knowledge and experience gathered from different projects and Incident Response cases to help our customers stay ahead of the threat actors. We continuously help customers improve their security posture within cloud, data center, endpoint management, identity, M365, and networking.
   

  

**The Role**
 The Security engineer interfaces regularly with team members and customers, determine technical requirements, feasibility of projects and expectations. You are responsible for maintaining, implementing, and designing client-facing solutions primarily in Active Directory, Entra ID, Azure and Microsoft 365 Security Solutions. This role is for someone who wants to be hands-on in a Microsoft infrastructure role leaning towards cloud but with the experience and knowledge of On-premises/hybrid environments. You must be able to think on your feet and you’ve got to want to learn and be part of a highly skilled and innovative team.
   

  

 Other responsibilities you might have can be:
   

  

* Run health and security checks on Active Directory, Microsoft 365 including Entra ID.
* Assisting our Customers with Tiering Projects.
* Provide customers with design and also assist with the actual implementation.
* Implement solutions based on Statement of Work with customers.


**Your Potential Background**
 We believe that your background probably entails 7+ years of experience and expertise within Microsoft solutions for both Cloud and On-premise/hybrid environments. You feel comfortable with guiding stakeholders towards a more secure and robust environment by giving technical recommendations that can persist the current threats present today.
   

  

 You are comfortable with guiding customers within areas such as: AD-Security, Entra ID-security, Windows Server Hardening, Azure security.
   

  

**Required Skills:**
* Active Directory Security
* Windows server Security
* Azure Security
* Microsoft 365 Security
* Overall a strong Cybersecurity competence within Microsoft Infrastructure.


**Bonus Skills:**
* Knowledge of scripting languages such as PowerShell and/or Python
* Cloud migration journeys from On-prem to Azure.
* Experience with Azure networking: Express Route, Virtual Network & Load Balancers
* Hypervisor knowledge of Hyper-V, VMware.
* Experience working with monitoring and logging tools (e.g.: Log Analytics, Azure Monitor, Azure Sentinel, ELK/ElasticSearch/Kibana)
* Experience with other cloud providers such as AWS and GCP.


*Due to the sensitivity in our assignments, we require Swedish citizenship, citizenship in an EU country, or a Swedish work permit.*
**Join Our Mission Toward a Safe Digital Future**
 If you truly want to make a difference and make our world a little bit safer, this is the place for you. At Truesec, you'll get to be at the forefront of fighting cybercrime instead of reading about it in the news. This is your chance to be part of an exciting journey in a leading cybersecurity company - and learn from some of the best in their field.
   

  

 So, are you ready to team up with the most dedicated team of experts and be part of a meaningful mission? Then we are excited to get to know you!

title: Systems Engineer
description:
**Systems Engineer**

**Systems Engineer**

Join Fortinet, a cybersecurity pioneer with over two decades of excellence, as we continue to shape the future of cybersecurity and redefine the intersection of networking and security. At Fortinet, our mission is to safeguard people, devices, and data everywhere. We are currently seeking a dynamic System Engineer, to contribute to the success of our rapidly growing business.


.  



**With us you will**

* Lead all technical aspects of a sales cycle with the Enterprise customers, from the initial RFIs, through to RFPs & RFQs when required. This includes the project management and active participation in POCs in partnership with the relevant teams both internally and within the customer and/or commercial partner.
* Have the ability to listen and to understand the technical requirements of the customer, reading between the lines to build a solution which outperforms the competitor offering.
* Be the primary technical point of contact for the customer(s) and partners in close collaboration with your sales partner.
* Continuously strive to improve knowledge around the Fortinet products and solutions, along with maintaining a deep understanding of the competitive landscape and Fortinet’s ability to provide long lasting protection against the ever-evolving threats.
* Have a strong ability to position Fortinet solutions to the customer, whether this be remotely or in person. This requires strong communication skills and the ability to confidently present through whiteboarding, technical white papers, technical plans or customer discussions.
* Manage your time effectively when working on multiple deals simultaneously, ensuring a positive customer experience is maintained.
Maintain accurate activity, contact, and account technical information of all customers and prospects in our CRM (Salesforce).  
* 

**Apply if you**

* Have a high aptitude for security technology, specifically encryption, authentication, with further knowledge of network security, intrusion detection, anti-virus, routing, switching, LAN and WAN being desirable. The CISSP accreditation would also be beneficial.
* Are currently or have previously worked in a pre-sales engineer role, managing end to end technical aspects of deals, through to technical closure.
* Can demonstrate your problem solving skills and how this has impacted key wins within your current organisation.
* Understand and can demonstrate your ability to build and maintain customer relationships, including your ability to effectively communicate technically to a range of both external and internal stakeholders.
Have a strong understanding one or multiple solutions e.g SD-WAN, ZTNA, IAM, Firewall, Switching and Wireless, SecOps, Cloud Security etc.  
* 

**Why Join Us:**

At Fortinet, we embrace diversity and inclusivity. We encourage applications from diverse backgrounds and identities. Explore our welcoming work environment designed for a rewarding career journey with an attractive Total Rewards package to support you with your overall health and financial well-being . Join us in bringing solutions that make a meaningful and lasting impact to our 660,000+ customers around the globe.  



**What you can expect from us**

* Excellent training and development opportunities, providing you with all the tools you need to be successful.
* An open working environment, sharing knowledge and information collaboratively and transparently, with respect to everyone’s thoughts and opinions.
* The opportunity to be part of an innovative, collaborative and winning team.
A competitive salary and incentive compensation package, including stock awards, health and welfare benefits.  
* 

From the start, the Fortinet vision has been to deliver broad, truly integrated, high-performance security across the IT infrastructure. Today, we secure the largest enterprises, service providers and government organizations around the world.  



Fortinet empowers its customers with intelligent, seamless protection across the expanding attack surface and the power to take on ever-increasing performance requirements of the borderless network – today and into the future. We have proven to be a truly innovative technology driven network security company with over 619 registered Global Patents. This is over 3 times more than our closest most innovative competitor!  



#LI-Remote
company_description: Mission: Dedicated to Delivering Security Without Compromise

title: Head of Go-To-Market (Data & AI)
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Data & AI
* ID 422407-en\_GB
At Capgemini, you have the opportunity to shape your career in a way that fits your life, your goals, and your ambitions; supported by a collaborative team where knowledge sharing and continuous learning are part of everyday work. We believe in reimagining what’s possible and using technology to build a more sustainable and inclusive future. Our Data & AI team leads the way in this mission, delivering end-to-end Data & AI solutions across industries. With over 550 specialists in the Nordics and strong partnerships with Google, AWS, Microsoft, Databricks, and Snowflake, and more we scale next‑generation cloud Data & AI with impact. Here, your skills matter, your ideas matter, and your growth matters. Join us and be part of transforming industries with cutting-edge data innovation. We value diverse perspectives and know that innovation happens when people with different backgrounds and experiences come together. We actively encourage people from underrepresented groups in tech to apply.
  

  

Ready to elevate your career? We are now looking for our next Head of Go-To-Market & Larger Deals, Data & AI Sweden, where you will lead a talented team of people and be part of the Capgemini Sweden Data & AI Leadership Team.


**Your role**
-------------


As Head of Go-To-Market for Data and AI in Sweden, you will lead the Data & AI sales team, driving the development and execution of growth strategies in close collaboration with the Sweden leadership team. You will own the End-To-End Go-To-Market engine, oversee pipeline development, forecasting, and performance management, while shaping and closing large, complex deals. You will define market priorities, build robust business cases, and align industry-focused sales efforts with our portfolio and key partners. In addition, you will have the opportunity to contribute as an expert consultant in selected client engagements, providing hands-on support in delivery when relevant.
  

  

*You will play a key role in:*  

  

**Strategic sales leadership & growth**


* Lead Data & AI GTM Team across Sweden in close collaboration with the Sweden MD
* Define and operationalize the Go-To-Market strategy (segmentation, value propositions, use cases)
* Qualify and pursue major opportunities, ensuring alignment with Business Lines and Data & AI offerings
* Drive pipeline growth, strategic deal wins, partner revenue, and market share

**Business development & client engagement**


* Build and maintain strong client relationships and external network
* Address complex client challenges and engage senior stakeholders
* Act as an expert consultant in selected client engagements, contributing to delivery through hands-on support when needed

**Deal execution & partnerships**


* Lead and orchestrate strategic deal shaping from qualification to closure
* Define and execute joint Go-To-Market strategies with partners (co-sell, co-innovation)
* Ensure strong Sales-to-Delivery transition including mobilisation and staffing

**Operations, performance & governance**


* Manage Go-To-Market operations, funnel tracking, reporting, and forecasting
* Ensure accurate forecasts and manage business development costs
* Design and implement performance management (KPIs)
* Support weekly, ad-hoc Sweden & Europe reporting
* Inspire high performance, build a strong sales culture, and act as a role model
**Your profile**
----------------


**Enterprise sales expertise & track record**


* Senior-level enterprise sales experience within Data & AI
* Proven track record of leading and closing large, complex transformation deals
* Strong experience in shaping advanced Data & AI services and solutions
* Passion for AI, data & analytics in an enterprise context

**Stakeholder management & influence**


* Strong ability to communicate and influence at senior business levels
* Proven capability to build and maintain relationships with key client stakeholders

**Market network & industry experience**


* Established client network within relevant industries
* Experience across horizontal business functions (e.g. finance, CX, procurement, HR, supply chain)
* Strong experience in at least two key sectors (e.g. Retail, Automotive, FS, Public Sector, etc.)

**Strategic advisory & solutioning capability**


* Ability to understand and shape complex client needs into Data & AI solutions
* Experience aligning solutions to client vision and transformation goals
**What we believe you will enjoy about working here**
-----------------------------------------------------


* A unique opportunity to shape Capgemini’s Data & AI growth agenda in Sweden, working closely with senior leadership and influencing some of the largest transformation programs in the market
* Freedom to finetune the role and be the best you can be, ensuring the success of Capgemini in a competitive market
* A culture shaped by Capgemini’s core values: Honesty, Boldness, Trust, Freedom, Team Spirit, Modesty, and Fun, where you actively contribute to bringing these values to life every day
* A comprehensive benefits package, including occupational and flexible pension schemes, private insurance, parental benefits, preventive healthcare and much more
  

  

We are primarily looking for candidates based in Stockholm, but we also welcome your application if you are located in Gothenburg or Malmö.


**Application**  

  

*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required. We are committed to building a diverse and inclusive workplace and welcome applications from people of all backgrounds, experiences and perspectives.*  

  

*Please note that, due to the* ***summer holiday period****, our response time may be slightly longer than usual. We appreciate your patience and look forward to getting back to you soon.*  

  

**About Capgemini**  

  

Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
  

  

**Make it real** | www.capgemini.com
company_description: Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value.

title: Product Manager - Data Center White Space (EMEA)
description:
**About Eaton**

Eaton is a global intelligent power management company helping customers manage energy more safely, efficiently and sustainably. Within Eaton's Distributed Power Quality (DPQ) business, Data Centers represent one of our fastest-growing and most strategic markets, driven by cloud computing, digitalization and Artificial Intelligence.


**What you’ll do:**
-------------------

You will own the strategy, roadmap and lifecycle management of Eaton's White Space portfolio across EMEA.


You will identify market opportunities, define product requirements and work closely with Engineering, Marketing, Sales and Operations teams across EMEA and North America to drive profitable growth and innovation in one of Eaton's most strategic segments.  



**Product Scope**

The portfolio includes:


* IT Racks & Accessories
* Rack PDUs
* Rack Power Solutions, including DC architectures
* Aisle Containment Systems
* POD Solutions
* Superstructure Solutions
* Data Center Monitoring & Management Software

These solutions contribute to Eaton's Grid-to-Chip approach for modern cloud, colocation and AI-driven Data Centers.  



**Key Responsibilities**

* Define and execute product strategy and roadmap.
* Manage the product lifecycle from development to end-of-life.
* Own product profitability and support pricing strategy.
* Gather customer insights and monitor market trends.
* Identify growth opportunities and competitive differentiators.
* Define requirements for new product development initiatives.
* Collaborate with engineering teams to deliver innovative solutions.
* Support go-to-market activities and product launches.
* Partner with global teams to align product roadmaps.
* Provide product expertise for strategic customers and major opportunities.
**Qualifications:**
-------------------

* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Business, Marketing or related field.
* Experience in Product Management, Product Marketing or Business Development.
* Experience within the Data Center industry.
* Knowledge of Data Center infrastructure technologies.
* Experience with White Space solutions (racks, rack PDUs, containment, PODs, modular infrastructure or similar technologies) is highly desirable.
* Strong business and financial acumen.
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills.
* Ability to work effectively in a global matrix organization.
* Fluent English required.
**Why Join Eaton ?**
--------------------

* Join one of Eaton's fastest-growing strategic businesses.
* Help shape the future of AI-ready Data Center infrastructure.
* Work on high-impact products deployed globally.
* Collaborate with teams across EMEA and North America.
* Grow your career within a global leader in intelligent power management.

#LI-JC2


All positions may require participation in video and in-person interviews as part of the hiring process. All candidates will be evaluated based on job-related competencies, and all candidates’ privacy rights and data security will be protected in accordance with applicable laws.  



We are committed to ensuring equal employment opportunities for job applicants and employees. Our recruitment processes use balanced selection criteria and avoid unlawful discrimination against applicants on the basis of their age, colour, disability, marital status, national origin, gender, gender identity, genetic information, race or racial origin, religion, sexual orientation or any other status protected or required by law.
company_description: Eaton is dedicated to improving the quality of life and the environment through the use of power management technologies and services.

title: Network Specialist Consultant
description:
We are looking for a **Network Consultant** to join us at Telia Cygate.


My name is Jenny Flaherty, and I lead our Networking team in Växjö. We are growing and looking for another expert who wants to develop together with us. Our team helps customers build, modernize, and secure critical network infrastructure, supporting their journey toward a robust digital future.


**What you’ll do:**

As a Network Consultant, you will work with everything from planning and designing network and security solutions to installation, configuration, and troubleshooting in complex IT environments for some of Sweden's largest customers.


Our customer engagements and delivery projects often span multiple service areas, meaning you will collaborate closely with specialists across networking, security, and hybrid IT. This gives you the opportunity to broaden your expertise and gain exposure to cloud, security, on-premises environments, and the latest technologies connecting them.


Your responsibilities will include:


* Designing and planning network and security solutions for customers on different levels
* Installing, configuring, administering, and troubleshooting complex network environments
* Working independently while maintaining close customer collaboration
* Contributing to customer projects and technical deliveries together with colleagues across multiple technology domains

**What will help you thrive in this role:**

We believe you are motivated by creating value for customers and enjoy turning requirements into practical, business-oriented solutions. You are proactive, solution-focused, and enjoy sharing knowledge with both customers and colleagues.


We would also like to see that you have:


* Deep expertise in switching and routing technologies
* Solid experience with SD-WAN solutions
* Broad knowledge of network security and related technologies
* Experience with installation, configuration, administration, and troubleshooting of LAN/WAN environments
* Strong business understanding and the ability to communicate effectively with customers and colleagues
* Excellent communication skills, with fluency in Swedish (native or near-native) and good English
* A valid Category B driver's license

It is considered a plus if you also have:


* Cisco CCNP or CCIE certifications
* Fortinet FCP or FCSS certifications
* Certifications within information or network security
* Experience working with hybrid IT environments
* Previous consulting experience

**Why Telia Cygate?**

At Telia Cygate, we’re not only experts in networks, security, and various types of cloud solutions – we’re also a team that believes work should be fun! As part of Telia Company, we have the strength to create real impact on a large scale, contribute to societal value, and help our customers navigate the world of digitalization. And we always do it with warmth, care, and a smile. Here, it’s our ideas and diverse perspectives that make us strong, and together we ensure that the world of technology becomes a place where everyone feels good – and where you belong.


Your development matters to us. We encourage continuous learning and make sure that you and your interests are in focus. We know that people are the heart of our company, which is why we value joy, creativity, and different perspectives in everything we do.


Welcome to grow together with us – where we make technology human and create real impact!


**Telia Cygate is proud to be certificated as Great Place to Work!**

With us, people are at the center – here you get the chance to grow, be challenged, and thrive together with dedicated colleagues. We are building a culture where security, togetherness, and opportunities go hand in hand. Do you want to be part of the journey? Welcome to a workplace that truly lives up to its name.


**What we offer**

When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.


**Interested? Apply!**

We look forward to receiving your application by **2026-08-09.** Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!


Location: Växjö


If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our **Talent Acquisition Partner.**  

Background and reference checks will be part of the process.


Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to **Jenny Flaherty** at **jenny.flaherty@cygate.se** .


We kindly ask recruitment agencies and external vendors not to contact us regarding this position.


**Equal opportunities**

At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.


**Welcome to Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Content Specialist
description:
Bli en del av något som håller ”Det håller” är EAB:s löfte, både externt och internt. Det håller grundar sig både i våra produkters tåliga konstruktion och hur vi tänker kring vårt arbete. Det ska kännas tryggt och utvecklande att välja EAB som sin arbetsplats – och vi är alla med och ser till att våra lösningar håller, långt in i framtiden.


Är du intresserad av att arbeta med inhouse-produktion och stärka ett välkänt varumärke? Då kan du vara vår nya Content Specialist som vill vara med och utveckla EAB:s kommunikation och innehåll för en internationell marknad.

 **Om rollen**  

Som Content Specialist har du en central roll i att utveckla och producera innehåll som stärker EAB:s varumärke, bygger förtroende och hjälper våra kunder genom hela kundresan.


Du arbetar nära våra affärsområden, säljorganisationen, HR och marknadsteamet för att omsätta affärsmål, teknisk kompetens och kundbehov till innehåll som engagerar, utbildar och skapar värde.


Rollen är både strategisk och operativ. Du ansvarar för att planera, samordna och producera innehåll i olika format samt säkerställa att kommunikationen är relevant, enhetlig och anpassad för olika målgrupper och marknader.

 **Dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden**

* Utveckla och producera innehåll som stärker EAB:s varumärke, stödjer affären och möter kundens behov genom hela kundresan.
* Ansvara för grafisk formgivning och visuell kommunikation samt producera marknads- och säljmaterial i linje med EAB:s visuella identitet
* Utveckla berättelser och innehåll som förankrar EAB:s varumärkeslöfte "Det håller.®"
* Skapa kommunikation som synliggör vår kultur, våra medarbetare och vårt erbjudande som arbetsgivare.
* Planera, koordinera och följa upp aktiviteter i nära samarbete med affär, sälj- och marknadsteam.
* Säkerställa riktlinjer för sociala medier, kanalval och tonalitet.
* Samordna innehåll globalt och anpassa det till lokala affärsbehov i våra dotterbolag.
* Äga och utveckla EAB:s content roadmap i linje med affärsplan och prioriterade marknadsinitiativ.
* Koordinera innehållsarbetet tillsammans med affärsområden, dotterbolag och andra intressenter för att säkerställa rätt prioritering, budskap och timing.

 **Vem är du?**  

Vi tror att du är en nyfiken och affärsorienterad innehållsspecialist som tycker om att förstå kundens behov och omsätta komplex kunskap till tydlig, inspirerande och relevant kommunikation.


Du arbetar strukturerat och långsiktigt, men trivs också i genomförandet och har lätt för att växla mellan strategi, planering och produktion. Du uppskattar samarbetet med olika delar av verksamheten och har en naturlig förmåga att skapa förtroende.

 **För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du**

  

* Har flera års erfarenhet av innehållsproduktion, kommunikation och grafisk formgivning i en affärsnära B2B-verksamhet.
* Har ett gott öga för grafisk design, layout och visuell kommunikation.
* Är en skicklig skribent med god känsla för tonalitet, målgrupp och berättande.
* Har erfarenhet av att producera innehåll för både digitala och tryckta kanaler.
* Har lätt för att sätta dig in i tekniska lösningar och omsätta komplex information till tydlig, inspirerande och affärsdrivande kommunikation.
* Har goda kunskaper i Adobe Creative Cloud, WordPress, sociala medier och relevanta digitala verktyg för innehållsproduktion och publicering.
* Arbetar strukturerat, prestigelöst och har en god förmåga att driva arbetet framåt.
* Kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.


Hos oss producerar vi innehåll inhouse. Det innebär att du blir en del av ett marknadsteam med specialistkompetens inom digital marknadsföring, foto, film, event, grafisk design och kommunikation. Tillsammans utvecklar vi innehåll som stärker vårt varumärke, bygger förtroende och bidrar till EAB:s fortsatta utveckling.


Vi söker dig som är nyfiken på människor, kan hitta berättelserna bakom tekniken och omsätta kunskap till kommunikation som stärker EAB:s affär, varumärke och vårt löfte – Det håller.®


Om EAB EAB är ett familjeägt företag beläget i Smålandsstenar, där vi på hederligt småländskt sätt har all konstruktion, produktion och utveckling under eget tak. Vi arbetar med tre produktområden: lagerinredningar, portar och stålbyggnader. Sedan starten 1957 har vi vuxit lika stadigt och stabilt som våra lösningar. Idag är vi 450 anställda och omsätter ca 2 200 MSEK.
